Whether boards should be breakable or not
How often (in seconds) new bounties are added or removed
bountiful.config.board.village_gen_frequ: How often bounty boards replace houses in villages
bountiful.config.bounty.allow_decree_mix: Whether all board decrees are considered when generating a bounty
bountiful.config.bounty.bonus_time.toolt: How much bonus time is given to bounties, in seconds
bountiful.config.bounty.expiry_timers.to: Whether bounties should have a timer and expire
bountiful.config.bounty.max_number_of_re: Determines the max number of rewards that will be in a bounty
bountiful.config.bounty.objective_requir: Makes new bounties this percent more or less expensive, objective-wise
bountiful.config.bounty.reverse_entry_ma: Setting this to true reverses the generation algorithm
bountiful.config.client.completion_toast: Whether toast messages should appear upon bounty completion
bountiful.config.debug.enable_chaos_mode: Whether chaos mode is enabled. Will override all base and config data.
bountiful.config.debug.pack_mode.tooltip: Turns on Modpack Dev mode for Bountiful. Is not saved.
bountiful.config.general.excluded_data_p: A list of data paths that should be excluded from loading
